L1_headline: + ESPR – Benjamin Halladay files to sell 7,337 shares. | 12/17/25
L2_brief: Benjamin Halladay, an officer at Esperion Therapeutics, filed to sell 7,337 shares of common stock valued at approximately $26,906. The sale is related to tax obligations from recently vested restricted stock, representing routine compensation-related selling rather than a discretionary decision to reduce holdings.

L3_detailed.broker_info: Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC, 900 Salem Street, Smithfield, RI 02917
risks_flagged: Sale appears routine - tied to tax withholding on vested equity award
Seller sold similar amount (7,046 shares) in September 2025 under same circumstances
Low dollar value sale (~$27K) suggests minimal conviction signal
